Challenge
Fire Hustle Amulet

When removing any effect from an ally, the amulet wearer restores health equal to 10% of the wearer's and the ally's max health.
The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

When removing any effect from an enemy, reduces the unit's damage by 15% for 7 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Also, the amulet wearer restores 10% health.
The ability triggers only once per 1 sec.

Once in a while, removes a random debuff from all allies and a random buff from all enemies.

Requirements: 98-100
